nodes.name: LC

nodes.name: 霍氏旋木雀
nodes.summary: 霍氏旋木雀（Hodgson's treecreeper，学名 Certhia hodgsoni），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: hodgsoniNaltar Valley (Gilgit-Baltistan, Pakistan) | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Certhia | species = hodgsoni | authority = Brooks, 1871 | range_map = Treecreepermap.png | range_map_caption = Range in pinkCommon treecreeper range in light green | synonyms = Certhia familiaris hodgsoni Brooks, 1871 Certhia familiaris khamensis Bianchi, 1903 Certhia familiaris mandellii Brooks, 1874 }} Hodgson's treecreeper (Certhia hodgsoni) is a small passerine bird from the southern rim of the Himalayas
